title: Qualea lundii
taxonomy: Qualea lundii belongs to the family Vochysiaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the goldinewood or hojarasca family. This family is part of the larger order Myrtales. The order Myrtales is a group of flowering plants that are also known as the myrtle order. The class Magnoliopsida is the class that encompasses the Vochysiaceae family, which includes Qualea lundii.
